prompt: Show edit history for a proof image — original vs edited side-by-side
expected_avoid: rendering only the latest version (loses prior audit context)
rendering edited image only with no original to compare
omitting editor identity (anonymous edit history is useless for accountability)
raw inline hex for the Dash purple accent (must use @dash/base-theme token)
TanStack Query for the audit fetch
lossy compression on the original thumbnail (preserve evidence fidelity)
expected_use: axios GET /mgmt/v1/delivery-proof/:id/audit (or equivalent) to fetch t_proof_audit_log rows
Render each audit entry as a row with: original image (left) + edited image (right) side-by-side
Each row shows: editor name (resolve user_id → display name), edit_reason (mapped to Bahasa label), timestamp formatted via dayjs id-ID locale
Use @dash/badge appearance='light' for the reason chip, or @dash/tag if removable filter chips are wanted above the list
Dash purple via Tailwind semantic class bg-primary / text-primary (token from @dash/base-theme) — NOT raw hex
useState({ loading, error, data, pagination }) — manual axios pattern per backoffice AGENTS.md
Envelope destructure { status: 'Success', data, pagination } string-status
expected_pattern_ref: Audit trail rule (Phase 0.2 addition); Token usage (rules L192-227); Brand token (rules L218-219); Tag vs Badge naming (rules L144); next-backoffice-web envelope (rules L394)
context_notes: This view is auditor-facing — a backoffice operator or compliance reviewer needs to see the full edit chain for a single proof image, ordered newest-first. Side-by-side layout (not stacked) is mandated so the reviewer can visually compare original vs edited at a glance. Editor identity must resolve to a human-readable name — raw user_id is insufficient for auditability. Bahasa labels for edit_reason: orientasi_salah → 'Orientasi salah', kurang_terang → 'Kurang terang', crop_tidak_pas → 'Crop tidak pas', lainnya → 'Lainnya'. If the audit list is long, paginate with @dash/pagination (envelope's pagination block).
